summary: Independent QA rejects RR0 roadmap adoption until goal-mode and model-routing current-task state is made internally consistent with the accepted R0 roadmap. Roadmap docs, R0 downstream graph, thread-registry lead identity, stale client not_found evidence, scope boundaries, and original-worktree restoration mostly check out, but parsed state still exposes stale M7 current-task fields that can route autonomous continuation back to the non-active renderer task.

decisions.decision: docs/29 is accepted as forward R0-R8 roadmap; docs/11 and docs/23 preserve old M0-M6/M0-M8 material as historical ledger rather than rewriting gate outcomes.
The RR0 graph contains exactly four downstream tasks, all DRAFT and dependency-ordered after RR0-ROADMAP-ADOPTION-001; no R1/RR1 task files were created.

Thread registry records exactly one active lead thread, 019eff50-c69d-7612-a90b-7024a47e0af5. The lead-added QA thread 019f4adb-1530-75a2-a801-a16b640793bf is treated as real. Stale client thread 019f1f02-6d7b-72a0-86db-8945be6b0606 records close_agent not_found without fabricated close success.
The original worktree roadmap/status documents are clean and the unrelated M7 renderer dirty work remains preserved.

risks.summary: taskctl ready being empty is correct for task dependencies but has no semantic coverage for goal-mode/model-routing current-task fields.
The lead set-thread edit introduced formatting drift in RR0-ROADMAP-ADOPTION-001.json; required validation is no longer reproducible until formatted.

blockers.repro: Parse both JSON files with Node and print current_milestone/current_task/current_tasks/current_task_status/next_machine_action. goal-mode parses as current_milestone=R0 but current_task=M7-STRATEGIC-TERRAIN-RENDERER-INTERACTION-001 and current_task_status=READY. model-routing parses as current_milestone=R0 but current_task/current_tasks still M7, and active_threads still lists stale M7 schema threads.
blockers.impact: This directly contradicts PROJECT_STATUS and taskctl list, which say RR0-ROADMAP-ADOPTION-001 is the REVIEW task and M7 renderer is PARTIAL non-active evidence. Autonomous Goal Mode or any state consumer can resume the rejected M7 renderer path despite the accepted R0 roadmap.
blockers.required_fix: Make goal-mode and model-routing canonical current-task fields agree with RR0-ROADMAP-ADOPTION-001 REVIEW and the four RR0-after-acceptance dependency design. Remove or archive stale top-level M7 current_task/current_tasks/current_task_status/next_machine_action/active_threads fields so JSON.parse cannot expose M7 renderer as operational READY/active.

blockers.repro: Run the writer-listed command: pnpm exec prettier --check docs/11-roadmap.md docs/23-milestone-acceptance-matrix.md docs/29-product-recovery-roadmap.md project/tasks/active/RR0-*.json
blockers.impact: The required validation command now fails after the accepted lead set-thread change, so the submitted review state is not reproducibly formatted.
blockers.required_fix: Format the lead thread-registration edit without dropping it, then rerun the required Prettier check.

requested_action: Do not accept RR0-ROADMAP-ADOPTION-001 yet. Route changes to the original writer/lead as appropriate to repair state consistency and formatting, then return for independent QA re-review.
